infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: REZ Driver needs your location to show nearby deliveries and track your deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: REZ Driver needs your location to track deliveries even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: REZ Driver needs camera access to take proof of delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: REZ Driver needs photo library access to save proof of delivery photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: REZ Driver needs your location to track deliveries.
